rationale: shadcn/ui is already the confirmed component layer (eb1ac338), and its first-party chart components wrap Recharts — so styling, theming, and tooltips come for free and stay consistent with the rest of the UI. Recharts handles the two v1 chart types (percentile fan/area bands and multi-series time lines) cleanly. visx/D3 give more control for exotic visuals but cost far more bespoke code than a closed personal tool warrants; ECharts/Highcharts are heavier and (Highcharts) licensed. Pick Recharts now and revisit only if a specific chart can't be expressed in it.
